{{CargoOrgan
|name=Vulcan's Wrath
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10660
|idx=17
|description=Molten fury waltzes upon this divine anvil, where the smith-god's soul burns eternal. Witness the apocalyptic crescendo when his hammer strikes!
|skill=Transform into Vulcan, dealing DMG equal to 163% of ATK!
|hp=1520
|def=199
|atk=144
|rush=136
|gene1=Lifesteal Effect +10%
|gene2=In Snail Arena, {race} HP +600
|gene3=All ELMT RES +20
|gene4=Snail Arena, Lifesteal Rate +20%
|gene7=Lifesteal Rate +10% (Awakened)
|}}
